creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any special reason why the upgrade-info.txt is not part of the distfile
package and installed with rest of the files? Right now users with
binary packages only systems are left in the dark about upgrade
instructions.
My advice would be to add this file to distfile tarball, install
upgrade-info.txt to ${DOCSDIR}, update info in Makefile, checksum in
pkg-plist so both ports and binary pkg users are on equal ground.

--=20
pozdrawiam / with regards
Pawe=B3 P=EAkala
